name: Peanut Butter Pie Hotel Iroquois
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, sugar and butter for the crust; press into a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Bake at 425°F for 9-10 minutes. Let cool completely.
3. For the filling, beat cream cheese with confectioners' sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in milk, peanut butter, and vanilla.
5. In a chilled bowl, whip cream until it holds stiff peaks.
6. Stir one third of the whipped cream into the peanut butter mixture.
7. Gently fold in the remaining cream to combine thoroughly.
8. Turn the filling into the cooled crust shell.
9. Sprinkle chopped peanuts over the pie.
10. Chill, covered, for at least 4 hours or overnight.
